subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Glorious Beauty! When that distinguished brother arrived at this luminous spot and laid his head upon the threshold of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبد جمال ابهی حضرت اخوی چون باین بقعه نورانی رسید و سر به استان رحمانی نهاد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
